name: analyst-kit
description: Hedge-fund-grade equity research for Claude. Forensic single-stock deep dives, thematic value-chain mapping, technical analysis with entry/exit levels, multi-page company-research wikis, and financial models — backed by US (SEC/FMP), global, and Taiwan (FinMind/TWSE) data, with charting and reporting. Ships a research-auditor subagent that fact-checks every deliverable for hallucinations and data errors before it reaches you, and a SessionStart hook that runs the runtime (onboarding, update check, telemetry).

FMP_API_KEY.title: Financial Modeling Prep API key (required)
FMP_API_KEY.description: Required to use the kit. Free key at https://site.financialmodelingprep.com/developer/docs — powers prices, fundamentals, news, and estimates. (SEC filings need no key.)

FINMIND_TOKEN.title: FinMind token (optional — Taiwan market data)
FINMIND_TOKEN.description: Optional — only the finmind skill (TWSE/TPEx data) needs it. Free token at https://finmindtrade.com/. Leave blank unless you research Taiwan stocks; you can add it later.

SERPAPI_API_KEY.title: SerpAPI key (optional — Google Trends)
SERPAPI_API_KEY.description: Optional — only the market-intelligence skill (Google-Trends nowcasting) needs it. Free tier (100/mo) at https://serpapi.com/. Leave blank unless you use that skill; you can add it later.
